LanguageData.TranscendentDropPods.label: nano relay drop
LanguageData.TranscendentDropPods.description:
Broadcast a forged nano-command uplink that hijacks nearby logistics satellites, forcing rapid deployment of several single-use strike pods onto the selected zone.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.BloodfeedUniverse.label: bloodfeed universe
LanguageData.BloodfeedUniverse.description:
Drain blood from any living nearby pawn, including hostile targets. Causes heavier blood loss and grants more hemogen than normal bloodfeed.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.NanoDisassemblyTransit.label: nano disassembly transit
LanguageData.NanoDisassemblyTransit.description:
Initiate the integrated nano-transit matrix and convert the body into a compressed subatomic data stream. Trillions of nanomachines encode molecular and neural states, relay the packet through synchronized orbital nodes, then reassemble matter at the destination with atomic precision.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.ArchotechRestoration.label: archotech restoration
LanguageData.ArchotechRestoration.description:
Deploy a focused archotech recovery lattice to rapidly close wounds, stop bleeding, and repair the worst injuries. The process is precise and stable, leaving the subject without mutation, infection, or psychic backlash.
-- easyrim
